# Svm

**Summary**: A machine learning algorithm used for classification and regression problems by finding the optimal hyperplane to separate data points.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2013-mark|Mark, 2013]] used SVM to learn patterns of high pore pressure regimes using seismic attributes as training data.

## Key Results and Findings

- The SVM successfully predicted the pore pressure trend at any given point within the 3D seismic survey area. ([[2013-mark|Mark, 2013, p. 12]])
